input: Ada Lovelace was born in 1815 and is considered the first computer programmer.
The Eiffel Tower was completed in 1889 in Paris, France.
Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1903.
The Wright brothers achieved powered flight in 1903 at Kitty Hawk.
Albert Einstein published the theory of general relativity in 1915.
The Great Wall of China was primarily built during the Ming dynasty.
Nikola Tesla developed the AC induction motor in 1887.
Rosalind Franklin's X-ray images contributed to the discovery of DNA's structure in 1953.
